_publications._publicationTitle: Unmasking Intra-tumoral Heterogeneity and Clonal Evolution in NF1-MPNST.

_contextSnippet: PantherDB was utilized to identify pathways that may be affected by these genes...This analysis suggests that there may be different functional programs at play across the three areas.
details: Successfully identified pathways affected by genes with copy number aberrations and differential expression, revealing different functional programs across three tumor areas
